judge_reason: Description A describes a yellowed newspaper clipping with tape marks and a red diagonal line, while Description B provides specific quoted headline and body text that is not mentioned in A, indicating a fundamental contradiction on the visual content and quoting text that the other does not see.
original_image_tags: A yellowed newspaper clipping taped to a light gray archival paper. The paper has two punched holes at the top. The clipping has visible tape marks and a thin red diagonal line drawn through it.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A document page with a clipped newspaper article headline reading “Local Man Reports Seeing What He Believes Was ‘Flying Disc’,” labeled “SOUTHWEST - TIMES RECORD, Ft. Smith, Arkansas, April 17, 1949,” with “ENCLOSURE” and handwritten number “62-83894-166” at the bottom.*
